query:
SELECT d.id, d.nome, d.descricao, d.ativo,
               (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE departamentoId = d.id) as totalUsuarios
        FROM departamentos d
        ORDER BY d.nome
        LIMIT 5;
command:

        FROM departamentos d
